creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Good day, Joe.

Right now portlint prints this message:
"possible direct use of command "python" found. use ${PYTHON_CMD} instead." 
if it founds "WX_COMPS=	python" in Makefile, and it seems confusing people (see ports/161963). It would be great to supress this message in such cases.

I'm not a perl guru, so i can't come with a patch, sorry. Thanks! 

PS: net-p2p/py-bittornado may be used for testing.
